formulas.expr:
case when [会员编号] is null then "散客"
when [会员首购时间] >=TO_DATE([m60_上市日期])then "新客"
else "老客" end
formulas.name: 新客/老客/散客

actions.name: 新客/老客/散客占比
actions.sql:
SELECT input1.`商品款色SKC`,  
/*拼接整体新老散客*/
concat(case when sum(input1.`商品数量_排除赠品`) = 0 then 0 else floor(round(sum(case when input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "新客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(input1.`商品数量_排除赠品`),2)*100) end,"%","/",case when sum(input1.`商品数量_排除赠品`) = 0 then 0 else floor(round(sum(case when input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "老客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(input1.`商品数量_排除赠品`),2)*100) end,"%","/",case when sum(input1.`商品数量_排除赠品`) = 0 then 0 else floor(round(sum(case when input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "散客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(input1.`商品数量_排除赠品`),2)*100) end,"%") as `新客/老客/散客占比`, 
/*拼接各渠道新老散客*/
 concat(  
      "整体：",  
     	  concat(case when sum(input1.`商品数量_排除赠品`) = 0 then 0 else floor(round(sum(case when input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "新客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(input1.`商品数量_排除赠品`),2)*100) end,"%","/",case when sum(input1.`商品数量_排除赠品`) = 0 then 0 else floor(round(sum(case when input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "老客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(input1.`商品数量_排除赠品`),2)*100) end,"%","/",case when sum(input1.`商品数量_排除赠品`) = 0 then 0 else floor(round(sum(case when input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "散客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(input1.`商品数量_排除赠品`),2)*100) end,"%"),
       char(10),
      "自营：",
 	      concat( case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "自营" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "自营" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "新客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "自营" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
  	case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "自营" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "自营" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "老客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "自营" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
   case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "自营" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "自营" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "散客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "自营" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%" ), 
      char(10), 
      "托管：",  
     	 concat( case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "新客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
  	case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "老客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
   case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "散客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%" ), 
     	char(10), 
     "电商：",  
     	concat( case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "新客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
  	case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "老客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
   case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管(特许)" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "散客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%" )
           
) as `各渠道新老散客占比`, 
/*自营各区域新老散客占比*/ 
concat(  
      "自营：",
 	      concat( case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "自营" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "自营" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "新客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "自营" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
  	case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "自营" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "自营" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "老客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "自营" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
   case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "自营" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "自营" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "散客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "自营" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%" ), 
      char(10), 
     "华北：",  
     	concat( case when sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华北" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华北" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "新客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华北" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
  	case when sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华北" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华北" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "老客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华北" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
   case when sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华北" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华北" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "散客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华北" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%" ), 
      char(10), 
      "华东：",  
     	 concat( case when sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华东" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华东" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "新客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华东" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
  	case when sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华东" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华东" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "老客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华东" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
   case when sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华东" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华东" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "散客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华东" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%" ), 
     	char(10), 
     "华南：",  
     	concat( case when sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华南" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华南" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "新客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华南" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
  	case when sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华南" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华南" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "老客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华南" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
   case when sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华南" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华南" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "散客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华南" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%" ),   
       char(10), 
     "西南：",  
     	concat( case when sum(case when input1.`区域` = "西南" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`区域` = "西南" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "新客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`区域` = "西南" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
  	case when sum(case when input1.`区域` = "西南" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`区域` = "西南" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "老客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`区域` = "西南" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
   case when sum(case when input1.`区域` = "华南" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`区域` = "西南" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "散客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`区域` = "西南" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%" )
/*
     "杭州：",  
     	concat( case when sum(case when input1.`区域` = "杭州" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`区域` = "杭州" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "新客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`区域` = "杭州" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
  	case when sum(case when input1.`区域` = "杭州" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`区域` = "杭州" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "老客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`区域` = "杭州" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
   case when sum(case when input1.`区域` = "杭州" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`区域` = "杭州" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "散客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`区域` = "杭州" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%" )     
*/
) as `自营(E/S/W/N/HZ)新老散客占比`, 
/*托管各区域新老散客占比*/ 
concat(  
      "托管：",
 	      concat( case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "新客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
  	case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "老客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
   case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "散客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%" ), 
      char(10), 
        "北区：",  
     	concat( case when sum(case when input1.`区域` = "北区" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`区域` = "北区" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "新客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`区域` = "北区" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",

             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`区域` = "北区" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "老客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`区域` = "北区" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",

   char(10),
/*

     	 concat( case when sum(case when input1.`区域` = "东区" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`区域` = "东区" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "新客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`区域` = "东区" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
  	case when sum(case when input1.`区域` = "东区" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`区域` = "东区" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "老客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`区域` = "东区" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
   case when sum(case when input1.`区域` = "东区" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`区域` = "东区" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "散客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`区域` = "东区" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%" ), 
     	char(10), 
*/
     "南区：",  
     	concat( case when sum(case when input1.`区域` = "南区" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`区域` = "南区" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "新客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`区域` = "南区" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
  	case when sum(case when input1.`区域` = "南区" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`区域` = "南区" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "老客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`区域` = "南区" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%","/",  
   case when sum(case when input1.`区域` = "南区" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else 
             floor(round(sum(case when input1.`区域` = "南区" and input1.`新客/老客/散客` = "散客" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`区域` = "南区" then input1.`商品数量_排除赠品` else 0 end),2)*100) end,"%" )   
) as `托管(E/S/N)新老散客占比` 

from input1 
GROUP by input1.`商品款色SKC`

columns.name: 销售与上市日期间隔周数

actions.name: SQL输入
actions.sql:
SELECT *  
from input1 
WHERE COALESCE(input1.`库位名称`,"NULL") in ("正品仓","合格品仓","线上线下共享仓","退货仓","NULL","")

formulas.expr: [尺码ID]
formulas.name: 尺码(数值)

formulas.expr:
case  
when [商品年] >= year(current_date()-1) then [实际上市日期]
when [商品年] = year(current_date()-1)-1 and [商品期] = "D期" and TO_DATE(CURRENT_DATE()-1) <=LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(concat(year(current_date()-1),"-03-01"))) then [实际上市日期]
else TO_DATE(CONCAT(year(current_date()-1),"-01-01")) 
end
formulas.name: 初始化上市日期

formulas.expr:
case  
when [商品年] >= year(current_date()-1) then "N"
when [商品年] = year(current_date()-1)-1 and [商品期] = "D期" and TO_DATE(CURRENT_DATE()-1) <=LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(concat(year(current_date()-1),"-03-01"))) then "N"
else "Y" end

actions.name: 单款颜色销量
actions.sql:
SELECT input1.`skc编码`, 
floor(sum(input1.`商品数量`)) as `累计销量`, 
floor(sum(input1.`期末库存数`)) as `库存`, 
floor(sum(input1.`期末库存吊牌额`)) as `库存金额`,  
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") then input1.`期末库存吊牌额` else 0 end)) as `自营库存金额`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" then input1.`期末库存吊牌额` else 0 end)) as `托管库存金额`,  
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" then input1.`期末库存吊牌额` else 0 end)) as `电商库存金额`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)) as `上周销量吊牌额`,  
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)) as `自营上周销量吊牌额`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)) as `托管上周销量吊牌额`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)) as `电商上周销量吊牌额`,
concat("(",floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/",floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/",floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),")") as `自营/托管/电商颜色累计销量`, 
concat("(",floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") then input1.`期末库存数` else 0 end)),"/",floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" then input1.`期末库存数` else 0 end)),"/",floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" then input1.`期末库存数` else 0 end)),"/",floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "总仓" then input1.`期末库存数` else 0 end)),")") as `自营/托管/电商颜色库存`, 
concat("(",floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") then input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/",floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" then input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/",floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" then input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/",floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "总仓" then input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),")") as `自营/托管/电商/总仓颜色总订单量`, 

/*2/4/8/16/季末销量*/ 
concat( 
    floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商") and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`上市2周` then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/",  
       floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商") and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`上市4周` then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/", 
       floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商") and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`上市8周` then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/", 
    	 floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商") and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`上市16周` then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/",
       floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商") and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`期末周` then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end))
      ) as `2/4/8/季末销量(颜色)`,  
/*自营2/4/8/16/季末销量*/ 
concat( 
       floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`上市2周` then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/",  
       floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`上市4周` then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/", 
       floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`上市8周` then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/", 
    	 floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`上市16周` then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/",
       floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`期末周` then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end))
      ) as `自营2/4/8/季末销量(颜色)`,  
/*托管2/4/8/16/季末销量*/
concat( 
       floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`上市2周` then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/",  
       floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`上市4周` then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/", 
       floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`上市8周` then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/", 
    	 floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`上市16周` then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/",
       floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`期末周` then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end))
      ) as `托管2/4/8/季末销量(颜色)`,  
/*电商2/4/8/16/季末销量*/ 
concat( 
       floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`上市2周` then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/",  
       floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`上市4周` then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/", 
       floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`上市8周` then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/", 
    	 floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`上市16周` then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/",
       floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`期末周` then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end))
      ) as `电商2/4/8/季末销量(颜色)`, 
/*2/4/8/16/季末消化率*/ 
concat(floor(case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商","总仓") then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商") and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`上市2周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商","总仓") then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)*100 end),"%","/",  
       floor(case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商","总仓") then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商") and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`上市4周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商","总仓") then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)*100 end),"%","/", 
        floor(case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商","总仓") then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商") and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`上市8周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商","总仓") then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)*100 end),"%","/", 
       floor(case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商","总仓") then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商") and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`上市16周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商","总仓") then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)*100 end),"%","/",
       floor(case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商","总仓") then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商") and input1.`Z-统计日期` <=input1.`期末周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商","总仓") then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)*100 end),"%"
      ) as `2/4/8/季末消化率(颜色)`,
/*自营2/4/8/16/季末消化率*/ 
concat(
       floor(case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else  sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") and input1.`Z-统计日期` <= input1.`上市2周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)*100 end),"%","/", 
       floor(case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else  sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") and input1.`Z-统计日期` <= input1.`上市4周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)*100 end),"%","/",
       floor(case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else  sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") and input1.`Z-统计日期` <= input1.`上市8周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)*100 end),"%","/",  
       floor(case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else  sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") and input1.`Z-统计日期` <= input1.`上市16周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)*100 end),"%","/",
    	 floor(case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else  sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") and input1.`Z-统计日期` <= input1.`期末周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)*100 end),"%"
      ) as `自营2/4/8/季末消化率(颜色)`, 
/*托管(特许)2/4/8/16/季末消化率*/ 
concat(
        floor(case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="托管（特许）" then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="托管（特许）"  and input1.`Z-统计日期` <= input1.`上市2周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="托管（特许）" then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)*100 end),"%","/", 
        floor(case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="托管（特许）" then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="托管（特许）"  and input1.`Z-统计日期` <= input1.`上市4周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="托管（特许）" then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)*100 end),"%","/", 
        floor(case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="托管（特许）" then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="托管（特许）"  and input1.`Z-统计日期` <= input1.`上市8周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="托管（特许）" then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)*100 end),"%","/",  
    	floor(case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="托管（特许）" then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="托管（特许）"  and input1.`Z-统计日期` <= input1.`上市16周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="托管（特许）" then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)*100 end),"%","/",
        floor(case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="托管（特许）" then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="托管（特许）"  and input1.`Z-统计日期` <= input1.`期末周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="托管（特许）" then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)*100 end),"%"
      ) as `托管2/4/8/季末消化率(颜色)` ,
/*电商2/4/8/16/季末消化率*/ 
concat(
       floor(case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="电商" then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="电商"  and input1.`Z-统计日期` <= input1.`上市2周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="电商" then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)*100 end),"%","/", 
    	floor(case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="电商" then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="电商"  and input1.`Z-统计日期` <= input1.`上市4周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="电商" then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)*100 end),"%","/",  
    	floor(case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="电商" then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="电商"  and input1.`Z-统计日期` <= input1.`上市8周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="电商" then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)*100 end),"%","/", 
    	floor(case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="电商" then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="电商"  and input1.`Z-统计日期` <= input1.`上市16周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="电商" then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)*100 end),"%","/",
    	floor(case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="电商" then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="电商"  and input1.`Z-统计日期` <= input1.`期末周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道`="电商" then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)*100 end),"%"
      ) as `电商2/4/8/季末消化率(颜色)`
from input1 
GROUP by input1.`skc编码`
order by input1.`skc编码`,`累计销量` desc

actions.name: 单款总销量
actions.sql:
SELECT input1.`skc编码`, 
floor(sum(input1.`商品数量` )) as `单款总销量` ,
floor(sum(input1.`期末库存数`)) as `单款总库存`, 
floor(sum(input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)) as `单款订单量`
from input1 
GROUP by input1.`skc编码`

selectedColumns.name: 自营/托管/电商颜色累计销量
自营/托管/电商颜色库存
自营/托管/电商/总仓颜色总订单量

actions.name: 颜色/销量/库存/占比
actions.sql:
select a.`skc编码`,replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(a) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `颜色/累计销量/%/库存/%`,replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(b) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `颜色/累计销量`,replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(c) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `颜色/库存`,replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(d) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `颜色/周转W`,replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(e) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `2/4/8/季末销量(颜色)`,replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(f) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `自营2/4/8/季末销量(颜色)`, 
replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(g) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `托管2/4/8/季末销量(颜色)`,replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(h) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `电商2/4/8/季末销量(颜色)`,replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(i) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `自营2/4/8/季末消化率(颜色)`, 
replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(j) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `托管2/4/8/季末消化率(颜色)`,replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(k) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `电商2/4/8/季末消化率(颜色)`,replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(l) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `2/4/8/季末消化率(颜色)`, 
replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(m) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `自营/托管/电商/总仓总订单量(颜色)`
from (
select *, 
    concat(floor(a.`累计销量`),"/",case when a.`单款总销量`=0 then 0 else floor(a.`累计销量`/a.`单款总销量`*100) end,"%","/",floor(a.`库存`),"/",case when a.`单款总库存`=0 then 0 else floor(a.`库存`/a.`单款总库存`*100) end,"%",char(10)) as a, 
    concat(a.`累计销量`," ",a.`自营/托管/电商颜色累计销量`,char(10)) as b, 
    concat(floor(a.`库存`)," ",a.`自营/托管/电商颜色库存`,char(10)) as c, 
    concat(case when a.`上周销量吊牌额`<=0 then "-" else floor(a.`库存金额`/a.`上周销量吊牌额`) end," ","(",case when a.`自营上周销量吊牌额`<=0 then "-" else floor(a.`自营库存金额`/a.`自营上周销量吊牌额`) end,"/",case when a.`托管上周销量吊牌额`<=0 then "-" else floor(a.`托管库存金额`/a.`托管上周销量吊牌额`) end,"/",case when a.`电商上周销量吊牌额`<=0 then "-" else floor(a.`电商库存金额`/a.`电商上周销量吊牌额`) end,")",char(10)) as d, 
    concat(a.`2/4/8/季末销量(颜色)`,char(10)) as e,  
    concat(a.`自营2/4/8/季末销量(颜色)`,char(10)) as f, 
    concat(a.`托管2/4/8/季末销量(颜色)`,char(10)) as g, 
    concat(a.`电商2/4/8/季末销量(颜色)`,char(10)) as h,
   	concat(a.`自营2/4/8/季末消化率(颜色)`,char(10)) as i, 
    concat(a.`托管2/4/8/季末消化率(颜色)`,char(10)) as j, 
    concat(a.`电商2/4/8/季末消化率(颜色)`,char(10)) as k,  
    concat(a.`2/4/8/季末消化率(颜色)`,char(10)) as l, 
   	concat(floor(a.`库存`+a.`累计销量`)," ",a.`自营/托管/电商/总仓颜色总订单量`,char(10)) as m
   	
from (
SELECT * from input1  
  order by input1.`skc编码`,input1.`累计销量` desc
 )a 
 )a 
 group by a.`skc编码`

actions.name: 上周销量&累销
actions.sql:
/*
线下渠道区域的顺序为华北/华东/华南/西南/北区/东区/南区；当前别名未改，顺序已调整，故需留意卡片上的别名需变更

*/

SELECT input1.`skc编码`,input1.`商品图片url`,input1.`颜色中文名称`,input1.`商品年`,input1.`实际波段`,input1.`运营波段（skc）`,input1.`实际上市日期`,input1.`初始化上市日期`,input1.`运营大类`,input1.`运营中类`,input1.`运营小类`,input1.`吊牌价`,input1.`吊牌价_港元`,input1.`销售折扣`, input1.`denim fit-family`,input1.`denim fit-name`,input1.`产品线(新)`,input1.`运营系列(新)`,input1.`版型`,input1.`是否归为旧货`,
floor(sum(case when input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)) as `上周销量`,  
floor(sum(case when input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,14) and DATE_SUB(current_date,8) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)) as `上上周销量`,
floor(sum(case when input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`实际成交额(扣券)` else 0 end)) as `上周销额`,  
floor(sum(case when input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,14) and DATE_SUB(current_date,8) then input1.`实际成交额(扣券)` else 0 end)) as `上上周销额`,   
floor(sum(input1.`近14天销售数量`)) as `近14天销量`, 
floor(sum(input1.`近7天销售数量`)) as `近7天销量`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,15) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)) as `近15天销量`,
floor(sum(case when input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,30) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)) as `近30天销量`,
  
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","港澳") and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`实际成交额(扣券)` else 0 end)) as `线下上周销额`, floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("电商") and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`实际成交额(扣券)` else 0 end)) as `线上上周销额`,  
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","港澳") and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,14) and DATE_SUB(current_date,8) then input1.`实际成交额(扣券)` else 0 end)) as `线下上上周销额`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("电商") and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,14) and DATE_SUB(current_date,8) then input1.`实际成交额(扣券)` else 0 end)) as `线上上上周销额`,  
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","港澳") and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)) as `线下上周销量`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("电商") and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)) as `线上上周销量`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","港澳") and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,14) and DATE_SUB(current_date,8) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)) as `线下上上周销量`,  
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("电商") and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,14) and DATE_SUB(current_date,8) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)) as `线上上上周销量`,  

 
floor(sum(case when input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`吊牌金额` else 0 end)) as `上周销售吊牌额`,
floor(sum(input1.`商品数量`)) as `累计销量`, 
floor(sum(input1.`实际成交额(扣券)`)) as `累计销额`, 
floor(sum(input1.`吊牌金额`)) as `累计吊牌额`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商","港澳","总仓") then input1.`期末库存数` else 0 end)) as `期末库存`,  
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商","港澳","总仓") then input1.`期末库存数`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)) as `库存金额`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商","港澳","总仓") then input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)) as `订单量`,  
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商","港澳","总仓") then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)) as `订单金额`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`Z-统计日期` <= input1.`上市2周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)) as `上市2周吊牌额`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`Z-统计日期` <= input1.`上市4周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)) as `上市4周吊牌额`,  
floor(sum(case when input1.`Z-统计日期` <= input1.`上市8周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)) as `上市8周吊牌额`,  
floor(sum(case when input1.`Z-统计日期` <= input1.`上市16周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)) as `上市16周吊牌额`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`Z-统计日期` <= input1.`期末周` then input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end)) as `季末周吊牌额`, 
round(case when sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商","港澳","总仓") then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end) = 0 then 0 else sum( input1.`商品数量`*input1.`吊牌价`)/sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商","港澳","总仓") then (input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)*input1.`吊牌价` else 0 end) end,2) as `累计消化率`,

floor(sum(case when input1.`Z-统计日期` <= input1.`上市2周` then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)) as `上市2周销量`,  
floor(sum(case when input1.`Z-统计日期` <= input1.`上市4周` then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)) as `上市4周销量`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`Z-统计日期` <= input1.`上市8周` then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)) as `上市8周销量`, 

floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","港澳") then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)) as `线下累计销量`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("电商") then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)) as `线上累计销量`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","电商","港澳") then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)) as `国内累计销量`, 

floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","港澳") then input1.`实际成交额(扣券)` else 0 end)) as `线下累计销额`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("电商") then input1.`实际成交额(扣券)` else 0 end)) as `线上累计销额`, 

floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","港澳") then input1.`吊牌价总额` else 0 end)) as `线下累计销售牌额`,  
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("电商") then input1.`吊牌价总额` else 0 end)) as `线上累计销售牌额`, 


floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","港澳") then input1.`期末库存数` else 0 end)) as `线下库存数量`,  
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("电商") then input1.`期末库存数` else 0 end)) as `线上库存数量`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("总仓") then input1.`期末库存数` else 0 end)) as `总仓库存数量`,  

  

floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销","托管（特许）","港澳") then input1.`期末库存吊牌额` else 0 end)) as `线下库存牌额`,  
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("电商") then input1.`期末库存吊牌额` else 0 end)) as `线上库存牌额`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("总仓") then input1.`期末库存吊牌额` else 0 end)) as `总仓库存牌额`, 

  

/*拼接各渠道上周销量*/
concat( "总：",

) as `店铺等级店均销量(线下)` 
*/ 

/*初始化消化率- - - - - - 主要用于初始化畅销款的判断*/ 
COALESCE(SUM(case when input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_TRUNC('month',input1.`初始化上市日期`) and TO_DATE(current_date()-1) then input1.`吊牌价总额`  else 0 end)/SUM(case when input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_TRUNC('month',input1.`初始化上市日期`) and TO_DATE(current_date()-1) then input1.`吊牌价总额`+input1.`期末库存吊牌额`  else 0 end),0) as `初始化消化率`,

/*电商平台*/
CONCAT_WS(
char(10),
concat("总：",floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end))),
concat(
        floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`区域`  = "天猫"  and input1.`品牌` = "正价场" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/",
        floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`区域`  = "抖音" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/",
        floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`区域`  = "微信" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end))
  ),
        floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`微分销门店编码` != "24251" and input1.`区域` not in ("抖音","微信") and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end))
) as `电商平台上周销量(天猫旗舰/抖音/微信<br>天猫奥莱/京东/小红书/得物<br>唯品会/员工特卖)`,

CONCAT_WS(
char(10),
concat("总：",floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`实际成交额(扣券)`else 0 end))),
concat(
        floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`区域`  = "天猫"  and input1.`品牌` = "正价场" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`实际成交额(扣券)`else 0 end)),"/",
        floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`区域`  = "抖音" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`实际成交额(扣券)`else 0 end)),"/",
        floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`区域`  = "微信" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`实际成交额(扣券)`else 0 end))
  ),
        floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`微分销门店编码` != "24251" and input1.`区域` not in ("抖音","微信") and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`实际成交额(扣券)`else 0 end))
) as `电商平台上周销额(天猫旗舰/抖音/微信<br>天猫奥莱/京东/小红书/得物<br>唯品会/员工特卖)`,

CONCAT_WS(
char(10),
concat("总：",floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end))),
concat(
        floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`区域`  = "天猫"  and input1.`品牌` = "正价场"  then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/",
        floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`区域`  = "抖音"  then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/",
        floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`区域`  = "微信"  then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end))
  ),
        floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`微分销门店编码` != "24251" and input1.`区域` not in ("抖音","微信") then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end))

) as `电商平台累计销量(天猫旗舰/抖音/微信<br>天猫奥莱/京东/小红书/得物<br>唯品会/员工特卖)`,

CONCAT_WS(
char(10),
concat("总：",FORMAT_NUMBER(ROUND(COALESCE(floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end))/floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,14) and DATE_SUB(current_date,8) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end))-1,0)*100,0),'#,###') || "%"),
  
concat(
        FORMAT_NUMBER(ROUND(COALESCE(floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`区域`  = "天猫"  and input1.`品牌` = "正价场" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end))/floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`区域`  = "天猫"  and input1.`品牌` = "正价场" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,14) and DATE_SUB(current_date,8) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end))-1,0)*100,0),'#,###') || "%","/",
        FORMAT_NUMBER(ROUND(COALESCE(floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`区域`  = "抖音" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end))/floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`区域`  = "抖音" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,14) and DATE_SUB(current_date,8) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end))-1,0)*100,0),'#,###') || "%","/",
        FORMAT_NUMBER(ROUND(COALESCE(floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`区域`  = "微信" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end))/floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`区域`  = "微信" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,14) and DATE_SUB(current_date,8) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end))-1,0)*100,0),'#,###') || "%"
  ),

        FORMAT_NUMBER(ROUND(COALESCE(floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商"and input1.`微分销门店编码` != "24251" and input1.`区域` not in ("抖音","微信") and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end))/floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`区域`  = "天猫"  and input1.`品牌` = "奥莱" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,14) and DATE_SUB(current_date,8) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end))-1,0)*100,0),'#,###') || "%"

) as `电商平台上周销量环比(天猫旗舰/抖音/微信<br>天猫奥莱/京东/小红书/得物<br>唯品会/员工特卖)`,

CONCAT_WS(
char(10),
concat("总：",FORMAT_NUMBER(ROUND(COALESCE(floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`实际成交额(扣券)` else 0 end))/floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,14) and DATE_SUB(current_date,8) then input1.`实际成交额(扣券)` else 0 end))-1,0)*100,0),'#,###') || "%"),
  
concat(
        FORMAT_NUMBER(ROUND(COALESCE(floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`区域`  = "天猫"  and input1.`品牌` = "正价场" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`实际成交额(扣券)` else 0 end))/floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`区域`  = "天猫"  and input1.`品牌` = "正价场" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,14) and DATE_SUB(current_date,8) then input1.`实际成交额(扣券)` else 0 end))-1,0)*100,0),'#,###') || "%","/",
        FORMAT_NUMBER(ROUND(COALESCE(floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`区域`  = "抖音" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`实际成交额(扣券)` else 0 end))/floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`区域`  = "抖音" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,14) and DATE_SUB(current_date,8) then input1.`实际成交额(扣券)` else 0 end))-1,0)*100,0),'#,###') || "%","/",
        FORMAT_NUMBER(ROUND(COALESCE(floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`区域`  = "微信" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`实际成交额(扣券)` else 0 end))/floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`区域`  = "微信" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,14) and DATE_SUB(current_date,8) then input1.`实际成交额(扣券)` else 0 end))-1,0)*100,0),'#,###') || "%"
  ),

        FORMAT_NUMBER(ROUND(COALESCE(floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`微分销门店编码` != "24251" and input1.`区域` not in ("抖音","微信") and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`实际成交额(扣券)` else 0 end))/floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`区域`  = "天猫"  and input1.`品牌` = "奥莱" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,14) and DATE_SUB(current_date,8) then input1.`实际成交额(扣券)` else 0 end))-1,0)*100,0),'#,###') || "%"
) as `电商平台上周销额环比(天猫旗舰/抖音/微信<br>天猫奥莱/京东/小红书/得物<br>唯品会/员工特卖)`

from input1 
GROUP by input1.`skc编码`,input1.`商品图片url`,input1.`颜色中文名称`,input1.`商品年`,input1.`实际波段`,input1.`运营波段（skc）`,input1.`实际上市日期`,input1.`初始化上市日期`,input1.`运营大类`,input1.`运营中类`,input1.`运营小类`,input1.`吊牌价`,input1.`吊牌价_港元`,input1.`销售折扣`,input1.`denim fit-family`,input1.`denim fit-name`,input1.`产品线(新)`,input1.`运营系列(新)`,input1.`版型`,input1.`是否归为旧货`

actions.name: 上周单款颜色销量
actions.sql:
SELECT input1.`skc编码`,input1.`颜色中文名称`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)) as `上周销量`, 
concat("(",floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/",floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/",floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),")") as `自营/托管/电商上周颜色销量`, 
concat(floor(sum(case when input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"(",floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` in ("自营","微营销") and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/",floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "托管（特许）" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),"/",floor(sum(case when input1.`大渠道` = "电商" and input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)),")") as `上周颜色销量(自营/托管/电商)`
from input1 
GROUP by input1.`skc编码`,input1.`颜色中文名称` 
order by input1.`skc编码`,`上周销量` desc

actions.name: 上周单款总销量
actions.sql:
SELECT input1.`skc编码`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`Z-统计日期` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(current_date,7) and DATE_SUB(current_date,1) then input1.`商品数量` else 0 end)) as `上周单款总销量`
from input1 
GROUP by input1.`skc编码`

selectedColumns.name: 自营/托管/电商上周颜色销量
上周颜色销量(自营/托管/电商)

actions.name: 上周颜色销量占比合并
单款尺码数量
actions.sql:
SELECT input1.`skc编码`,input1.`尺码中文描述`, input1.`尺码(数值)`,
floor(sum(input1.`商品数量`)) as `累计销量`, 
floor(sum(input1.`期末库存数`)) as `库存`
from input1 
GROUP by input1.`skc编码`,input1.`尺码中文描述` ,input1.`尺码(数值)`
order by input1.`skc编码`,input1.`尺码(数值)`

actions.name: 单款颜色尺码
actions.sql:
SELECT input1.`skc编码`,input1.`尺码中文描述`, input1.`尺码(数值)`,input1.`尺码ID`,input1.`颜色ID`,
floor(sum(input1.`商品数量`)) as `单款颜色尺码累计销量`, 
floor(sum(input1.`期末库存数`)) as `单款颜色尺码库存`, 
floor(sum(input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)) as `单款颜色尺码订单量`
from input1 
GROUP by input1.`skc编码`,input1.`尺码中文描述` ,input1.`尺码(数值)`,input1.`尺码ID`,input1.`颜色ID`
order by input1.`skc编码`,input1.`尺码(数值)`

actions.name: 尺码/销量/库存/占比
单款颜色总销量
actions.sql:
SELECT input1.`skc编码`,input1.`颜色中文名称`,input1.`尺码ID`,input1.`颜色ID`,
floor(sum(input1.`商品数量` )) as `单款颜色总销量`,
floor(sum(input1.`期末库存数`)) as `单款颜色总库存`, 
floor(sum(input1.`期末库存数`+input1.`商品数量`)) as `单款颜色订单量`
from input1 
GROUP by input1.`skc编码`,input1.`颜色中文名称`,input1.`尺码ID`,input1.`颜色ID`

selectedColumns.name: 单款颜色尺码累计销量

actions.name: 颜色分组
actions.sql:
select a.`skc编码`,replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(a) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `尺码订单`,replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(b) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `尺码订单%`,replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(c) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `尺码销售`,replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(d) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `尺码销售%`,replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(e) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `尺码库存`,replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(f) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `尺码库存%`, 
replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(g) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `颜色/尺码/订单量/订单量%/销量/销量%/库存/库存%`,replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(h) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `尺码销售%(V2)`
from (
select *,
concat(a.`尺码中文描述`," ",floor(a.`单款颜色尺码订单量`),";") as a, 
concat(a.`尺码中文描述`," ",case when a.`单款颜色订单量`=0 then 0 else floor(ROUND(a.`单款颜色尺码订单量`/a.`单款颜色订单量`,2)*100) end,"%",";") as b,  
concat(a.`尺码中文描述`," ",floor(a.`单款颜色尺码累计销量`),";") as c,  
concat(a.`尺码中文描述`," ",case when a.`单款颜色总销量`=0 then 0 else floor(ROUND(a.`单款颜色尺码累计销量`/a.`单款颜色总销量`,2)*100) end,"%",";") as d, 
concat(a.`尺码中文描述`," ",floor(a.`单款颜色尺码库存`),";") as e, 
concat(a.`尺码中文描述`," ",case when a.`单款颜色总库存`=0 then 0 else floor(ROUND(a.`单款颜色尺码库存`/a.`单款颜色总库存`,2)*100) end,"%",";") as f, 
concat(a.`尺码中文描述`,"/",a.`单款颜色尺码订单量`,"/",case when a.`单款颜色订单量`= 0 then 0 else floor(ROUND(a.`单款颜色尺码订单量`/a.`单款颜色订单量`,2)*100) end,"%","/",a.`单款颜色尺码累计销量`,"/",case when a.`单款颜色总销量`= 0 then 0 else floor(ROUND(a.`单款颜色尺码累计销量`/a.`单款颜色总销量`,2)*100) end,"%","/",a.`单款颜色尺码库存`,"/",case when a.`单款颜色总库存`= 0 then 0 else floor(ROUND(a.`单款颜色尺码库存`/a.`单款颜色总库存`,2)*100) end,"%",";") as g , 
concat(a.`尺码ID`,"：",case when a.`单款颜色总销量`=0 then 0 else floor(ROUND(a.`单款颜色尺码累计销量`/a.`单款颜色总销量`,2)*100) end,"%",char(10)) as h
from (
SELECT * from input1  
  order by input1.`skc编码`,input1.`尺码(数值)` asc
 )a 
 )a 
 group by a.`skc编码`

actions.name: 颜色/尺码订单/销售/库存/%
actions.sql:
select a.`skc编码`,replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(a) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `尺码订单`,replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(b) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `尺码订单%`,replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(c) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `尺码销售`,replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(d) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `尺码销售%`,replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(e) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `尺码库存`,replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(f) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `尺码库存%`, 
replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(g) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `颜色/尺码/订单量/订单量%/销量/销量%/库存/库存%`, 
replace(replace(replace(cast(collect_list(h) as string),'[',''),']',''),',','') as `尺码销售%(V2)`
from (
select *,
concat(a.`尺码订单`,char(10)) as a, 
concat(a.`尺码订单%`,char(10)) as b,  
concat(a.`尺码销售`,char(10)) as c,  
concat(a.`尺码销售%`,char(10)) as d, 
concat(a.`尺码库存`,char(10)) as e, 
concat(a.`尺码库存%`,char(10)) as f, 
concat(a.`颜色/尺码/订单量/订单量%/销量/销量%/库存/库存%`,char(10)) as g, 
concat(a.`尺码销售%(V2)`,char(10)) as h
from (
SELECT * from input1  
  order by input1.`skc编码`
 )a 
 )a 
 group by a.`skc编码`

formulas.expr:
case  
when [渠道(SO)] = "电商" then "电商"    
when [采购方仓库编码] = "DCA0_1000" then "电商"   
else [渠道(SO)] end
formulas.name: 渠道(SO)-R

actions.name: SQL输入
actions.sql:
SELECT input1.`skc编码`, 
concat("总：",floor(sum(input1.`PO订单数量`)), 
  char(10),"渠道：",
  floor(sum(case when input1.`渠道(SO)-R` = "自营" then input1.`PO订单数量` else 0 end)),"/", 
  floor(sum(case when input1.`渠道(SO)-R` = "托管（特许）" then input1.`PO订单数量` else 0 end)), "/",
  floor(sum(case when input1.`渠道(SO)-R` = "电商" then input1.`PO订单数量` else 0 end)), "/",
  floor(sum(case when input1.`渠道(SO)-R` = "港澳" then input1.`PO订单数量` else 0 end)),"/",
  floor(sum(case when input1.`渠道(SO)-R` = "总部" then input1.`PO订单数量` else 0 end))
  
  )as `总订量(PO)`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`订单原因名称` = "期货" then input1.`PO订单数量` else 0 end)) as `头单订量(PO)`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`订单原因名称` = "后期加单" then input1.`PO订单数量` else 0 end)) as `翻单订量(PO)`, 

floor(sum(input1.`PO订单金额(CNY)`)) as `总订额(PO)`,  
floor(sum(case when input1.`订单原因名称` = "期货" then input1.`PO订单金额(CNY)` else 0 end)) as `头单订额(PO)`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`订单原因名称` = "后期加单" then input1.`PO订单金额(CNY)` else 0 end)) as `翻单订额(PO)`, 


floor(sum(case when input1.`渠道(SO)-R` = "自营" then input1.`PO订单数量` else 0 end)) as `自营订量(PO)`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`渠道(SO)-R` = "托管（特许）" then input1.`PO订单数量` else 0 end)) as `托管订量(PO)`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`渠道(SO)-R` = "电商" then input1.`PO订单数量` else 0 end)) as `电商订量(PO)`,  
floor(sum(case when input1.`渠道(SO)-R` = "总部" then input1.`PO订单数量` else 0 end)) as `总部订量(PO)`,  
floor(sum(case when input1.`渠道(SO)-R` = "自营" then input1.`PO订单金额(CNY)` else 0 end)) as `自营订额(PO)`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`渠道(SO)-R` = "托管（特许）" then input1.`PO订单金额(CNY)` else 0 end)) as `托管订额(PO)`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`渠道(SO)-R` = "电商" then input1.`PO订单金额(CNY)` else 0 end)) as `电商订额(PO)`,  
floor(sum(case when input1.`渠道(SO)-R` = "总部" then input1.`PO订单金额(CNY)` else 0 end)) as `总部订额(PO)`,

floor(sum(case when input1.`渠道(SO)-R` in ("自营","托管（特许）","港澳") and input1.`订单原因名称` = "期货" then input1.`PO订单数量` else 0 end)) as `线下头单订量(PO)`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`渠道(SO)-R` in ("电商") and input1.`订单原因名称` = "期货" then input1.`PO订单数量` else 0 end)) as `线上头单订量(PO)`,
floor(sum(case when input1.`渠道(SO)-R` in ("总部") and input1.`订单原因名称` = "期货" then input1.`PO订单数量` else 0 end)) as `总部头单订量(PO)`,

floor(sum(case when input1.`渠道(SO)-R` in ("自营","托管（特许）","港澳") and input1.`订单原因名称` = "期货" then input1.`PO订单金额(CNY)` else 0 end)) as `线下头单订额(PO)`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`渠道(SO)-R` in ("电商") and input1.`订单原因名称` = "期货" then input1.`PO订单金额(CNY)` else 0 end)) as `线上头单订额(PO)`, 
floor(sum(case when input1.`渠道(SO)-R` in ("总部") and input1.`订单原因名称` = "期货" then input1.`PO订单金额(CNY)` else 0 end)) as `总部头单订额(PO)`

  
from input1 
GROUP by input1.`skc编码`

actions.name: 排名
actions.sql:
SELECT *, 
row_number() over (ORDER by input1.`上周销量` desc) `上周销量排名`, 
row_number() over (ORDER by input1.`上周销额` desc) `上周销额排名`, 
row_number() over (ORDER by input1.`线下上周销额` desc) `线下上周销额排名`,
row_number() over (ORDER by input1.`累计销量` desc) `累销排名`, 
row_number() over (ORDER by input1.`期末库存` desc) `库存排名`, 
row_number() over (partition by input1.`商品年` order by input1.`上周销量` desc) `商品年上周销量组内排名`,
row_number() over (partition by input1.`商品年`,input1.`实际波段` order by input1.`上周销量` desc) `商品年每波段上周销量组内排名`,
row_number() over (partition by input1.`商品年`,input1.`运营中类` order by input1.`上周销量` desc) `商品年中类上周销量组内排名`,  
row_number() over (partition by input1.`商品年` order by input1.`累计销量` desc) `商品年累销组内排名`,
row_number() over (partition by input1.`商品年`,input1.`实际波段` order by input1.`累计销量` desc) `商品年每波段累销组内排名`,
row_number() over (partition by input1.`商品年`,input1.`运营中类` order by input1.`累计销量` desc) `商品年中类累销组内排名` 
from input1

formulas.expr:
case 
when [商品年] >= year(current_date()-1) then DATEDIFF(current_date()-1,TO_DATE([初始化上市日期])) div 7 + 1
when [商品年] = year(current_date()-1)-1 and [商品期] = "D期" and TO_DATE(CURRENT_DATE()-1) <=LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(concat(year(current_date()-1),"-03-01"))) then DATEDIFF(current_date()-1,TO_DATE([初始化上市日期])) div 7 + 1
else DATEDIFF(current_date()-1,[初始化上市日期]) div 7 +1 end

formulas.name: 全渠道消化率目标

mappings.colName: 累计折扣/自营/托管/电商/港澳

formulas.expr: [初始化消化率]-[全渠道消化率目标]
formulas.name: 全渠道消化率落差

formulas.expr:
case 
when [是否归为旧货] = "Y" and [初始化消化率] > [全渠道消化率目标]*1.2 then "畅销"
when [是否归为旧货] = "Y" and [初始化消化率]  between [全渠道消化率目标]*0.8 and [全渠道消化率目标]*1.2 then "平销"
when [是否归为旧货] = "Y" and [初始化消化率] < [全渠道消化率目标]*0.8  then "滞销"
when [初始化上市周] = 1 and [初始化消化率]-[全渠道消化率目标] >= -0.02 then "畅销"   
when [初始化上市周] = 1 and [初始化消化率]-[全渠道消化率目标] >= -0.16 and [初始化消化率]-[全渠道消化率目标] < -0.02 then "平销"  
when [初始化上市周] = 1 and [初始化消化率]-[全渠道消化率目标] < -0.16 then "滞销" 
when [初始化上市周] between 2 and 8 and [初始化消化率]-[全渠道消化率目标] >= -0.05 then "畅销" 
when [初始化上市周] between 2 and 8 and [初始化消化率]-[全渠道消化率目标] >= -0.16 and [初始化消化率]-[全渠道消化率目标] < -0.05 then "平销" 
when [初始化上市周] between 2 and 8 and [初始化消化率]-[全渠道消化率目标] < -0.16 then "滞销" 
when [初始化上市周] > 8 and [初始化消化率]-[全渠道消化率目标] >=0 then "畅销"  
when [初始化上市周] > 8 and [初始化消化率] between [全渠道消化率目标]*0.8 and [全渠道消化率目标]*0.9999 then "平销"
when [初始化上市周] > 8 and [初始化消化率] < [全渠道消化率目标]*0.8 then "滞销" 
else null end
formulas.name: 全渠道畅平销

formulas.expr:
case 
when [商品年] < 2025 then SUBSTR([skc编码],1,12)
else SUBSTR([skc编码],1,10)end
formulas.name: spu

actions.name: 填报_集团_目标_新品消化率_指定SKC

formulas.expr: DATE_ADD(DATE_TRUNC("week",current_date()-1),6)
formulas.name: 本周周日

formulas.expr:
case when [日期]= 
DATE_ADD(DATE_TRUNC("week",current_date()-1),6) then 1 
else 0 end
formulas.name: 是否为本周日

actions.name: 渠道累计消化率目标
actions.sql:
SELECT input1.`skc_code`, 
round(sum(case when input1.`渠道` = "自营" then input1.`目标消化率` else 0 end),2) as `自营累计消化率目标`, 
round(sum(case when input1.`渠道` = "托管（特许）" then input1.`目标消化率` else 0 end),2) as `托管累计消化率目标`, 
round(sum(case when input1.`渠道` = "电商" then input1.`目标消化率` else 0 end),2) as `电商累计消化率目标`
from input1  
where input1.`是否为本周日` = 1 
GROUP by input1.`skc_code`

actions.name: SQL输入
actions.sql:
SELECT input1.`skc_code`,input1.`渠道`, 
sum(case when input1.`日期` <=input1.`本周周日` then input1.`目标订单吊牌额` else 0 end ) as `渠道累计吊牌额目标`, 
round(sum(case when input1.`日期` = input1.`本周周日` then input1.`目标消化率` else 0 end ),2) as `渠道累计消化率目标`
from input1 
GROUP by input1.`skc_code`,input1.`渠道`

formulas.expr: [渠道累计吊牌额目标]/[渠道累计消化率目标]
formulas.name: 渠道订单金额

actions.name: 全渠道消化率目标
actions.sql:
SELECT input1.`skc_code`, 
round(sum(input1.`渠道累计吊牌额目标`)/SUM(input1.`渠道订单金额`),2) as `全渠道消化率目标`
from input1 
GROUP by input1.`skc_code`
